name: Peppermint Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the mint leaves in the vodka for eight days, shaking occasionally.
2. Strain the leaves using a metal strainer and press all the fluid out of the leaves.
This step should not be omitted as it contains considerable flavor. Many small particles of leaves will remain in your alcohol and mint solution at this point. If desired, strain further through cheesecloth.
3. Add the sugar syrup and glycerine.
